title: Requisites for Renewal. The POSE shall submit a written application
content: 33 together with the following requirements: 34 35 a. Certified copy of the Certificate of Accreditation by MARINA; 36 37 b. Bank Certificate and Escrow Deposit Agreement indicating that the escrow of 38 Seven Hundred Fifty Thousand Pesos (PhP750,000.00) is still intact; and 39 40 c. Proof of payment of license fee of One Hundred Thousand Pesos 41 (PhP100,000.00). 42 43 The Department, in accordance with law and after consultation with the stakeholders, 44 may modify the list or prescribe additional requirements for the renewal of the special 45 license. 46 47
